Subject.description: Subject identifier used for pairing observations across the two diet conditions.

After_meal_Normal.description: Post-prandial (after meal) resting metabolic rate (kcal/min) under the Normal diet. These measurements are from the same subjects as After_meal_Overfed.

After_meal_Overfed.description: Post-prandial (after meal) resting metabolic rate (kcal/min) under the Overfed diet. These measurements are from the same subjects as After_meal_Normal.
